title: FlowTiers
description: A mod that displays player stats from FlowPvP.gg in their nametags, tablist and HUD.
body:
# FlowTiers

A client-side Fabric mod that brings your FlowPvP stats in-game and shows nametags, tab list, HUD, leaderboards and more. Fully customizable via **Mod Menu**.

## Features

**Stats & Display**
- FlowPvP stats on player nametags and the tab list
- Draggable, scalable HUD for your own stats
- Global, Highest Tier, and per-ladder(all gamemodes) display modes
- Choose which stats show and in what order (look in Mod Menu under Nametag)

**Leaderboards & Profiles**
- In-game leaderboard browser — scroll pages, switch ladders, click to open profiles
- Search players by name
- Revisit recently viewed players and save favorites
- View ladder stats, positions, and rating history
- Copy a Discord-ready stats summary or shareable profile link

**Other**
- `/flowtiers <player>` — look up any player's ranked stats
- Optional Modrinth version checker

## Requirements
[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) · [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) · [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

## Links & Credits
**Made by** [Fecl](https://github.com/ykk4ga) **&** [micahcode](https://github.com/MicahXX) **·** [FlowPvP Website](https://flowpvp.gg/) **·** [FlowPvP Discord](https://discord.gg/XwZ7JrHP3U)
